string.c(3) Library Functions Manual string.c(3)

NAME

string.c - String utility functions for WASM/Emscripten.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


size_t platform_strlcpy (char *dst, const char *src, size_t size)
Safe string copy with size tracking (strlcpy). size_t platform_strlcat (char *dst, const char *src, size_t size)
int platform_strcasecmp (const char *s1, const char *s2)
Case-insensitive string comparison. int platform_asprintf (char **strp, const char *fmt,...)
Allocate formatted string (asprintf replacement). char * platform_strdup (const char *s)
Duplicate string (strdup replacement). asciichat_error_t platform_memcpy (void *dest, size_t dest_size, const void *src, size_t count)
Platform-safe memcpy wrapper. asciichat_error_t platform_memset (void *dest, size_t dest_size, int ch, size_t count)
Platform-safe memset wrapper. int platform_vsnprintf (char *str, size_t size, const char *format, va_list ap)
Safe variable-argument string formatting. int platform_strncasecmp (const char *s1, const char *s2, size_t n)
Case-insensitive string comparison with length limit.

Detailed Description

String utility functions for WASM/Emscripten.

Definition in file platform/wasm/string.c.

Function Documentation

size_t platform_strlcat (char * dst, const char * src, size_t size)

Definition at line 27 of file platform/wasm/string.c.

27                                                                  {
28   size_t dst_len = strlen(dst);
29   size_t src_len = strlen(src);
30 
31   if (dst_len >= size) {
32     return dst_len + src_len;
33   }
34 
35   size_t remaining = size - dst_len;
36   size_t copy_len = (src_len >= remaining) ? remaining - 1 : src_len;
37   memcpy(dst + dst_len, src, copy_len);
38   dst[dst_len + copy_len] = '\0';
39 
40   return dst_len + src_len;
41 }
